headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: Folk is part of the broader wave of AI tools and automation experiments, while Super is purpose‑built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer and gets cheaper and faster over time thanks to a reusable computer‑use cache. This page compares where Folk fits, how the market is evolving, and why Super is the sharper choice for repeated computer‑use workflows.
